subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been laid before the Presence, and the gaze of grace is directed towards it. Praise be unto God that it is adorned with the mention and praise of the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی الوجه حاضر و طرف عنایت بان ناظر لله الحمد که بطراز ذکر و ثنای حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity
